Describe the sequence of actions performed on the cherries using the blue tool and glass bottle.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a blue tool is pushed into the top of a red cherry held by fingers; at 5s, the man uses the tool to force a cherry into the neck of a glass bottle; at 6s, the man lifts the glass bottle horizontally to look through it.

question: What visual elements appear during the transition from the kitchen demonstration to the title screen?
canonical_answer: At 6s, the man holds a plastic bottle containing yellow chunks horizontally in front of his face; at 7s, the video frame splits into two panels showing the same man in different poses; at 9s, text overlays reading MAD and TIPS appear with scattered red particles.
